app.name: SafeTool Pix
app.description: Organize, rename, and optimize your photo library

dialog.load_all_groups_msg:
There are {count} groups. Are you sure you want to load them all?
This may take a while and consume memory.

zero_byte.title: Empty files
zero_byte.short_description: These files are 0 bytes and contain no information. It is 100% safe to delete them
zero_byte.long_description: Scans your folders for "ghost files" (0-byte or corrupted files) that contain no useful data. They can be safely removed because they are useless.

live_photos.title: Live Photos
live_photos.short_description: iPhone Live Photos (Image + MOV). The MOV videos will be deleted to free up space
live_photos.long_description: iPhone Live Photos consist of an image and a short video. This tool detects these pairs and lets you decide whether to keep both, or clean up the video component to save space if you only care about the still photograph.

heic.title: HEIC/JPG Duplicates
heic.short_description: HEIC photos with identical JPG versions. Choose which format to keep and free up space
heic.long_description: Finds cases where you have the same photograph in two formats: HEIC (used by iPhones) and the traditional JPG. The tool helps you identify these duplicates and remove the redundant versions to free up space.

duplicates_exact.title: Exact copies
duplicates_exact.short_description: 100% identical files even if they have different names. It is completely safe to delete them
duplicates_exact.long_description: Analyzes your collection to find files that are mathematically identical. This is the safest form of cleanup, as it guarantees that you are not deleting a "similar" photo, but exactly the same file repeated in different folders (even if it has a different name).

visual_identical.title: Visually identical copies
visual_identical.short_description: Visually identical files but with different internal data. Happens with photos sent via WhatsApp or resized.
visual_identical.long_description: Identifies images (videos in future versions) that are visually indistinguishable to the human eye, even though they are technically different files (for example, a copy downloaded from the internet, or the same photo saved on different dates). Ideal for removing WhatsApp copies, repeated screenshots, or resized images.

duplicates_similar.title: Similar files
duplicates_similar.short_description: Detects similar but not identical images (edits, crops, different resolution...)
duplicates_similar.long_description:
Detects photos (videos in future versions) that are very similar but not identical. This is perfect for:
• Selecting the best shot from a burst of photos.
• Removing slightly edited or cropped versions you no longer need.
• Detecting low-resolution copies.

file_organizer.title: Smart organization
file_organizer.short_description: Organizes images and videos into a new folder structure
file_organizer.long_description: This tool analyzes your files and proposes a new logically organized folder structure (for example, by Year/Month), allowing you to relocate thousands of photos with a single click and keep your library spotless.

file_renamer.title: Full rename
file_renamer.short_description: Files will be renamed to the format YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MM-SS_<PHOTO|VIDEO> using their creation date
file_renamer.long_description: Standardizes your filenames professionally. You can change cryptic names like "IMG_8823.JPG" to useful and readable formats like "20241231_112300_PHOTO.jpg", using dates and automatic sequences to avoid name conflicts.

cleanup.title: Cleanup & space
cleanup.description: Free up space by removing unnecessary files

stage1.header_title: Step 1: select the folder with your photos
stage1.tip_choose_folder: Choose the folder where you have your iPhone photos and videos, WhatsApp media, or any collection you want to organize.
stage1.tip_privacy_notice: SafeTool Pix will only analyze that folder and all its subfolders. Nothing will be modified until you authorize it.
stage1.step2_header: Step 2: choose what you want to do
stage1.step2_empty_state: Tools will appear here after analyzing your folder

error.invalid_selection_msg: Please select a folder, not an individual file.

error.analysis_msg: An error occurred during folder analysis.

cancel.title: Cancel analysis
cancel.confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to cancel the analysis?

banner.stale_stats:
Outdated statistics
Changes have been made to the files. The displayed statistics may not be accurate.

confirm.delete_msg:
This operation will permanently delete files.

Are you sure you want to continue?

Do you want to update the statistics for {name}?

This will recalculate only the {name} analysis to reflect the changes made. The metadata cache is already up to date.

Note: This operation is fast and only affects {name}.
confirm.change_folder_msg: Change folder? The current analysis will be lost.

info.no_visual_identical_msg:
No visually identical copies were found.

All images are visually unique.
info.no_files_to_analyze_msg:
No images or videos were found to analyze.

Make sure the directory contains supported files.
info.stats_updated_msg: The statistics for {name} have been updated successfully.

result.backup_simulation: Backup: Not created in simulation mode
result.backup_no_files: Backup: Requested but no files found to back up
result.errors_warning: Warning: {count} errors were found during the operation.
result.simulation_note: SIMULATION MODE: No actual changes were made to the files.

confirmations.title: Confirmations
confirmations.confirm_delete: Ask for additional confirmation for delete operations
confirmations.confirm_delete_tooltip: Double confirmation for operations that delete files
confirmations.confirm_reanalyze: Confirm before reanalyzing after executing operations
confirmations.confirm_reanalyze_tooltip:
If enabled, confirmation will be requested before updating statistics.
If disabled, statistics will be updated automatically after destructive operations.

interface.title: Interface
interface.language_restart_msg: The language change will be applied the next time you start the application.
interface.show_full_path: Show full directory path in the search bar
interface.show_full_path_tooltip:
If enabled, shows the full directory path (e.g.: /home/user/Photos).
If disabled, shows only the folder name (e.g.: Photos).

dry_run.title: Simulation Mode (Dry Run)
dry_run.info: In simulation mode, operations are analyzed and displayed but not actually executed. Useful for verifying what the application will do before applying changes.
dry_run.enable_default: Enable simulation mode by default for all operations
dry_run.enable_default_tooltip:
If enabled, all delete dialogs (HEIC, Live Photos, Duplicates)
will show the 'Simulation mode' checkbox checked by default.
This adds an extra layer of safety to prevent accidental deletions.

system_tools.title: System Tools
system_tools.info: External tools are required to extract video metadata (duration, creation date). Without them, the video analysis phase will be automatically skipped.
system_tools.check_button_tooltip: Check if the tools are installed

config.title: Initial Analysis Configuration
config.info: Control what information is extracted during the initial directory scan. Disabling options makes the scan faster, but each tool's analysis will take longer when opened.
config.precalculate_hashes: Pre-calculate SHA256 hashes for all files
config.precalculate_hashes_tooltip:
Pre-calculates SHA256 hashes for all files during the initial scan.

ADVANTAGES:
  • 'Exact duplicates' tool is INSTANT (all hashes are ready)
  • Ideal if you always search for duplicates

DISADVANTAGES:
  • Makes the initial scan VERY slow (calculates hash for every file)
  • For 10,000 files: scan goes from ~10s to ~2-5 min

RECOMMENDATION: Leave DISABLED (on-demand analysis is efficient).
config.image_exif_tooltip:
Extracts EXIF metadata from all images during the initial scan.

ADVANTAGES:
  • Organization and rename tools are faster
  • Moderate cost during initial scan (~30-60 sec for 30k photos)

DISADVANTAGES:
  • Adds time to the initial scan

RECOMMENDATION: Leave ENABLED (the cost is reasonable and useful for most users).
config.video_exif: Extract EXIF metadata from videos (VERY SLOW)
config.video_exif_tooltip:
Extracts video metadata using ffprobe during the initial scan.

WARNING: This process is EXTREMELY SLOW
  • For 5,000 videos: ~3-10 additional minutes
  • Blocks the initial scan

ADVANTAGES:
  • Video organization tool has data ready

DISADVANTAGES:
  • Makes the initial scan MUCH slower
  • Most users don't organize videos by date

RECOMMENDATION: Leave DISABLED (on-demand analysis is much more efficient).

auto.title: Automatic Backups
auto.warning_info: Highly Recommended: Backups allow you to recover files in case of an error.
auto.enable: Automatically create a backup before each destructive operation
auto.enable_tooltip:
If enabled, a backup will be created before:
• Renaming files
• Deleting Live Photos
• Deleting HEIC duplicates
• Organizing folders

directory.title: Backup Directory
directory.info: Location where automatic backups are saved.

logs.title: Logs & diagnostics
logs.info: Log files record all operations for diagnostics and auditing.
logs.level_tooltip:
DEBUG: All technical information
INFO: Normal operations
WARNING: Unusual situations
ERROR: Severe errors only
logs.dual_log: Create additional file with WARNING and ERROR only (for large datasets)
logs.dual_log_tooltip:
When enabled and the log level is INFO or DEBUG:
• A main file will be created with ALL logs (suffix: _INFO or _DEBUG)
• An additional file will be created with WARNING and ERROR only (suffix: _WARNERROR)

Useful for large datasets where the full log is very extensive.
This option is automatically disabled if the level is WARNING or ERROR.
logs.dual_log_disabled_tooltip:
This option is only available for INFO or DEBUG levels.
With WARNING or ERROR level, all logs already contain only warnings and errors.
logs.disable_file_logging: Do not write log files to disk
logs.disable_file_logging_tooltip:
When enabled:
• No log files will be written to disk
• Only WARNING and ERROR messages will be shown in the console
• DEBUG and INFO messages will be completely discarded

Recommended if you don't need to keep operation records.
This option disables the logs directory, detail level and dual logging.

performance.title: Performance
performance.workers_tooltip:
Number of parallel threads for processing files.

• 0 (Automatic): Detects and uses the optimal number for your hardware
• I/O workers: {io_workers} (reading/hashing)
• CPU workers: {cpu_workers} (image analysis)

Only change this if you experience performance issues.
Valid range: 1-{max_workers}
performance.ui_update_tooltip:
How often user feedback is provided during analyses.
Higher values improve performance but provide less feedback.
Lower values (1) may slow down the process.
Recommended: 10-50
performance.restart_note: Changing the number of threads requires restarting the application to take full effect.

debug.title: Debug
debug.clear_all_info: This will delete all saved preferences and restore default values.

confirm.clear_all_message:
Are you sure you want to delete ALL saved settings?

This includes:
• Backup preferences
• Custom folders
• Logging level
• All other settings

The application will return to default values.
confirm.restore_message: Restore all settings to default values?

messages.cleared_message:
All settings have been deleted.
It is recommended to restart the application.
messages.restored_message:
Settings restored to default values.

Press 'Save Changes' to apply.
messages.saved_logs_changed: The logs directory has changed. New logs will be written to the new location.
messages.restart_required_intro: Changes have been saved that require restarting the application to take effect:
messages.restart_question: Do you want to restart the application now?
messages.restart_needed_message:
Changes have been saved successfully, but will NOT take effect until you restart the application.

The application may not behave as expected until it is restarted.

welcome.title: Welcome to SafeTool Pix
welcome.description: A suite of tools for managing, optimizing, and organizing your photos and videos. Absolute privacy: all processing is 100% local on your computer.
welcome.workflow_description: SafeTool Pix is designed to follow a logical flow and progressively optimize your collection. Follow these 4 steps for the best results:

1.title: Folder selection
1.description: The first step is to choose the folder containing your photos and videos. The system will work recursively.

2.title: Analysis
2.description: We automatically scan files, extract EXIF metadata, and calculate digital signatures (hashes).

3.title: Tool Selection
3.description: Enter each tool to detect duplicates, organize by date, or clean up unnecessary files.

4.title: Execute Changes
4.description: After reviewing the proposed action plans, confirm execution. We recommend using Simulation Mode first.

system_tools.title: Recommended external tools
system_tools.info: External tools are needed to analyze videos (duration, date). Without them, video features will be limited.

dev.subtitle: Your files never leave your device. All operations are 100% local.
dev.trust_footer: All your content is safe and under your exclusive control.

base.backup_tooltip:
Creates a backup before making changes.
Recommended for destructive operations.

Backup folder: {path}

You can change the folder from Settings.
base.dry_run_tooltip:
Simulates the operation without making actual changes.
Useful for verifying which files would be affected.

When simulation mode is enabled, backup is automatically
disabled since no actual changes will be made.
base.backup_path_label: Folder where deleted files will be saved: {path}
base.backup_path_tooltip:
Full path: {path}

You can change this folder from Settings.
base.backup_disabled_tooltip:
Backup is disabled because simulation mode is active.
No actual changes will be made, so creating a backup is unnecessary.

warning.tools_unavailable_msg: Neither ffprobe nor exiftool were detected on the system. Without these tools, it is not possible to validate video duration or dates. Live Photos are detected only by name matching, which may include false positives.
warning.no_validation_msg: Video metadata extraction is disabled. Live Photos are detected only by name matching, validating only dates from the filesystem. This may include false positives.

filter.source_tooltip: Filter groups by comparison date source

info.title: Important Note
info.message:
File renaming may affect paired files such as Live Photos or HEIC+JPG if they are not renamed together.

Name conflicts will be resolved by adding a numeric suffix (e.g.: _1, _2) to avoid overwriting.

problems.title: Files with Problems ({count})
problems.description: These files cannot be processed and will be skipped:

tree.conflict_file_tooltip: Conflict: A numeric suffix will be added

file_renamer.dialog_load_all_msg:
There are {count} files in {folders} folders. Are you sure you want to load them all?
This may take a while and consume memory.

details.conflict_value: Yes - Will be resolved with a numeric suffix

selection.title: How would you like to organize your files?
selection.subtitle: Select an organization strategy

date.title: Organize by Date
date.desc: Creates chronological folders based on each file's date
date.hint: Granularity: month, year, or both · Subfolders: source, type

type.title: Organize by Type
type.desc: Separates files into folders by their type

cleanup.title: Move All to Root
cleanup.desc: Removes subfolders and moves everything to the main directory

file_organizer.button_back_tooltip: Go back to choose another organization strategy

options.cleanup_desc: All files will be moved to the main directory, without subfolders
options.label: Options:
options.backup_tooltip:
Creates a backup before moving files.
Recommended for destructive operations.

Backup folder: {path}

You can change the folder from Settings.
options.dry_run_tooltip:
Simulates the operation without actually moving files.
Useful for verifying which files would be moved.

When simulation mode is enabled, backup is automatically
disabled since no actual changes will be made.
options.cleanup_empty_tooltip:
Removes all empty folders within the selected
path after organizing the files.

Includes both folders that become empty after
moving files and folders that were already empty
before the organization was executed.

Folders containing only system files
(.nomedia, .DS_Store, Thumbs.db, etc.) are also
considered empty and will be removed.
options.move_unsupported_tooltip:
Moves unsupported files (GIF, documents, etc.)
to an 'other/' folder in the root directory,
preserving their original subfolder structure.

This prevents loose files from remaining outside
the chosen organization.
options.backup_path_label: Folder where moved files will be saved: {path}
options.backup_path_tooltip:
Full path: {path}

You can change this folder from Settings.
